name: Szechuan Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and cut it into 2-inch thick rounds.
2. Slice the rounds into wedges (similar to pizza slices).
3. Heat some water or broth in a non-stick pan.
4. Cook the eggplant wedges, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly browned on all sides. This should take about 3-5 minutes per side.
5. Add the sliced scallions to the pan.
6. Mix together the Hot Szechuan sauce, reduced sodium teriyaki sauce, and cold water in a small bowl.
7. Pour the sauce mixture into the pan with the eggplant and stir to coat evenly.
8. Serve over plain rice, adding more water if desired, as the sauces used were quite hot.
